query: SELECT id, name, keywords, subreddits, offering FROM outreach_campaigns ORDER BY id;

rows.keywords: ["i wish someone would build, why doesn't this exist, why is there no app for, struggling to find a tool, can't find anything that does, frustrated with, this sucks, why is X so hard, nobody has solved, looking for a solution to, is there a better way to, tired of manually, hate that I have to, why do I still have to, there has to be a better way, this workflow is broken, every tool I try, nothing works for, spent hours trying to, why isn't there a simple, I've been looking everywhere for, built my own because, had to hack together, cobbled together, duct tape solution, [tool]: # \"is terrible for, [tool] doesn't support, [tool] keeps breaking,\" wish [tool] could, [tool] sucks at, why can't [tool] just, anyone else frustrated by, does anyone else struggle with, am I the only one who, please tell me there's a better way, I would pay for something that, would literally pay money if, take my money if you build, someone needs to build, this is a million dollar idea but, gap in the market for, underserved market, nobody is solving, pain point that nobody addresses"]
rows.offering: Your next app (to be validated — listen-only campaign, no DM pitch)
